target_r1_desc: Angle locked at 45°. Calculate velocity to hit 80m.
target_r2_desc: Velocity locked at 35 m/s. Calculate angle to hit 120m.
target_r3_desc: Angle locked at 30°. Hit the 60m crate.
target_r5_desc: On the Moon! Angle locked at 55°. Hit 100m.
target_r6_desc: Two targets! Angle locked at 40°. Hit both.
target_r7_desc: Air drag ON! Angle locked at 35°. Compensate!
target_r8_desc: Mars gravity. Velocity locked at 45 m/s. Hit 200m.
target_r9_desc: Triple targets! Same angle, adjust velocity each shot.
target_r10_desc: Final challenge: drag ON, velocity locked at 38 m/s. Prove your mastery.
